description_long: This is a medium-sized, two-seater sofa upholstered in a textured brown fabric. The sofa features wide, rolled armrests that are generously padded and extend slightly outward from the seat. The backrest is gently curved and includes three evenly spaced, fabric-covered buttons for subtle decorative tufting. The seat consists of a single, thick, rectangular cushion that appears firmly attached to the base. The sofa stands on four short, blocky legs with a dark finish, providing a sturdy foundation. Its overall design is classic and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A brown, two-seater sofa with rolled armrests, a curved tufted backrest, and a single seat cushion, supported by four dark block legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide rolled armrests, single seat cushion, and three-button tufted backrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, rounded armrest and the sofa's overall depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, gently curved backrest and the sofa's solid back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same rounded armrest and visible seat depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, thick, rectangular seat cushion and a continuous backrest with three attached, tufted buttons; all cushions appear fixed and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, rolled armrests that are fully padded, extending slightly outward and positioned at the same height as the backrest; classic and substantial in appearance.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs with a dark, likely wooden or plastic finish, positioned at each corner and slightly recessed under the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, gently curved backrest that is continuous across the width, featuring three evenly spaced tufted buttons for subtle decoration.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Textured, solid brown fabric with a subtle woven appearance and three tufted buttons on the backrest; no visible decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
